title: Autumn Drop Backport
description: This mod aims to recreate the Dappled Forest and other features showcased during the latest Minecraft LIVE.
body:
![Main banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/87d427ee569b74fa41919c077794a64699902710_0.webp)
# Autumn Drop Backport
This mod aims to recreate the features showcased during the latest Minecraft LIVE and bring them to current and also older Minecraft versions.

![cold pig wandering around the camp](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f6d307baf291ad9996a468527038cb6d397752f0_0.webp)

## Included Features

* Dappled Forest biome
* Full Poplar wood set

  * Logs
  * Stripped Logs
  * Wood
  * Stripped Wood
  * Planks
  * Stairs
  * Slabs
  * Fences
  * Fence Gates
  * Doors
  * Trapdoors
  * Signs
  * Hanging Signs
  * Boats
  * Chest Boats
  * Buttons
  * Pressure Plates
* Red Shrub
* Shelf Mushroom
* Poplar Sapling
* Red, Orange, and Yellow Poplar Leaves
* Wool Stairs
* Wool Slabs
* Straw Bed
* Abandoned Camp

## Note:
The straw bed has some visual glitches. Known issues include messed up particle textures and false advancement text in chat. If you sleep in a straw bed, your spawnpoint won't be set but the chat will still display the Sweet Dreams advancement, this is a visual bug, you don't actually get the advancement.

## Disclaimer

This is an unofficial fan-made backport inspired by the features shown during Minecraft Live. All assets have been recreated for this project and are not extracted from unreleased Minecraft files.
